proceduretest

Class Query

  • java.lang.Object
    • proceduretest.Query

  • public class Query
extends java.lang.Object
    The Class Query is used to store the information concerning the aStar. It hold start and end node id, cost and x,y properties, and all the restrictions which have to be fulfilled by the aStar during traversal. It also ensure that the given properties keys and relationship types do exist within the database.
    Version:
    1.0
    Author:
    Nikita Maslov

    • Constructor Detail

      • Query

        public Query(org.neo4j.graphdb.GraphDatabaseService graphService,
             long start,
             long end,
             java.lang.String costProperty,
             java.lang.String xProperty,
             java.lang.String yProperty,
             java.lang.String coordinateType,
             java.util.List<java.lang.String> relationshipTypes,
             java.util.List<java.lang.String> nodeProperties,
             java.util.List<java.lang.String> relationshipProperties,
             java.lang.String direction)
      throws java.lang.IllegalArgumentException
        Constructor for the Class Query.
        Parameters:
        graphService - A GraphDatabaseService which is used for checking relationship types and properties.
        start - The id of the start node.
        end - The id of the end node.
        costProperty - The property which aStar will use to calculate the costs for traversing a relationship.
        xProperty - The property which represents the x value if "XY" is used as coordinateType or the latitude if the coordinate type is "COORDINATES"(longitude latitude representation).
        yProperty - The property which represents the y value if "XY" is used as coordinateType or the longitude if the coordinate type is "COORDINATES"(longitude latitude representation).
        coordinateType - The way the nodes coordinates are represented.
        relationshipTypes - The relationship Types which can be traversed by aStar.
        relationshipProperties - The entry's in the list can be either names of the properties(only relationships which have this property will be traversed) or expressions(only relationships which have the property and a property value that fulfills the expression will be traversed). For further details concerning the expressions read the aStarPlugin manual.
        nodeProperties - The entry's in the list can be either names of the properties(only nodes which have the property will be traversed) or expressions(only nodes which have the property and a property value that fulfills the expression will be traversed). For further details concerning the expressions read the aStarPlugin manual.
        direction - The Direction of relationships which will be traversed.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException

        Returns:
